TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: siwsa ku demiad, mahida u nanum, slaw han u lawpes tu nu mihcaan . hican pasatedep ku malumanay a mihcaan , misuayawy tu baluhay a mihcaan ayda makakutay tu baluhay atu malumanay, haminen miasik ku udip, hatu nayien , bakahen ku laecusay kalaluman! maminnay a cacay mihcaan, payawan kapah laecus haw, , umaminay tu, payawan masukip masiku haw, saahebalen ku balucu'. . u kapahay ibalucu'en , alahican datengen, tawalen ku laecusay, manatu kasinpay. . anu tabtabaki kiya kawaw , anu cila a mihcaan u adidi'ay tu a kawaw, mana pidateng tu mamin nay akawaw awasen ayda, manatu pidateng,makawaa kaayaw. . maminnay amihcaan ,maemek ita ku ngelu' usadakadakay, idaw ku ngelu' aledah cilemin sicedam, u nitanaman kuyd u cacanan , nunikaufipan a naemekan . anu caay kalipahak , bilaw han ku piadih. anu caay kadamsay, satanengen ku anub, anu cay kakapah sa , misaicelang pacakay tu udip. . sakapahen ku kawaw, amana pisabelih tu udip, ucaculilan adadan sakapah han muculcul. . anu cay kakapah sa , misaicelang pacakay tu udip. . sakapahen ku kawaw, amana pisabelih tu udip, ucaculilan adadan sakapah han muculcul. . paydangen ku balucu' manaibalucu'i., ubabalahan bakahiy , manapidateng tu. . u tahekalay a kawaw , suayaw han, u liyas sananay a tademaw pabin tu pasepi nu nababalaki . tawalen ku ngelu' atu sinpay, bakahiy tu ku mikawaay tu udip, dihemay han ku balucu' sakapah han maudip tu dedemiad. lawpes tu nu mihcaan, sakapahen ku udip, u cayay kaw matatudungay a tademaw saycan tu pidateng, ucay kalalucuk a kawaw saycan tu pi kilim nayay ku niwci a kawaw manapacici.ŚĻīŚļēšļÜ, . minanam muputun pabeli miliyas, Ś≠łśúÉśĖ∑ść®ťõĘ, kasenun sa mupuu't,atu maminnay a kawaw, , tawalen ku naayaway hida han tu.śääŚĺěŚČćŚŅėŤ®ėťáčśá∑, kasibalucu' maudip ayda, saicelang han taayaw. . malumanay amihcaan ,yadatu, baluhay amihcaan iniwtu. . panatu kudemiad u lawpes tu numihcaan , miliyas tu tu ayaway, , tinaku tu naayaway, walesay han ku udip, danayien ku balucu'. sahemawen kunaayaway, danayien ku udip, pasanayen ku balucu'. . bakahyi ku laecusay , bakahyi ku lalum lalum daaw . . saicelang han pacakay ku udip, kasitalul satabali han ku awas, , ngay itanamin i baluhay a mihcaan misaicelang mala kasenenga , maniket adasayen Kuni kaudip salihalay han maudip!
S.PHON: siwsa ku d…ômiad, mańßida u nanum, sr~…ĺaw ńßan u r~…ĺawp…ôs tu nu mińß ¶aan . ńßi ¶an pasat…ôd…ôp ku mar~…ĺumanaj a mińß ¶aan , misuajawj tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a mińß ¶aan ajda makakutaj tu bar~…ĺuńßaj atu mar~…ĺumanaj, ńßamin…ôn miasik ku udip, ńßatu naji…ôn , bakańß…ôn ku r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman! maminnaj a ¶a ¶aj mińß ¶aan, pajawan kapańß r~…ĺa…ô ¶us ńßaw, , umaminaj tu, pajawan masukip masiku ńßaw, saańß…ôbar~…ĺ…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. . u kapańßaj ibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °…ôn , ar~…ĺańßi ¶an dat…ôŇč…ôn, tawar~…ĺ…ôn ku r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj, manatu kasinpaj. . anu tabtabaki kija kawaw , anu ¶ir~…ĺa a mińß ¶aan u adidi Ē~ °aj tu a kawaw, mana pidat…ôŇč tu mamin naj akawaw awas…ôn ajda, manatu pidat…ôŇč,makawaa kaajaw. . maminnaj amińß ¶aan ,ma…ôm…ôk ita ku Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° usadakadakaj, idaw ku Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ar~…ĺ…ôdańß ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin si ¶…ôdam, u nitanaman kujd u ¶a ¶anan , nunikaufipan a na…ôm…ôkan . anu ¶aaj kar~…ĺipańßak , bir~…ĺaw ńßan ku piadińß. anu ¶aaj kadamsaj, satan…ôŇč…ôn ku anub, anu ¶aj kakapańß sa , misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč pa ¶akaj tu udip. . sakapańß…ôn ku kawaw, amana pisab…ôr~…ĺińß tu udip, u ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan adadan sakapańß ńßan mu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ. . anu ¶aj kakapańß sa , misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč pa ¶akaj tu udip. . sakapańß…ôn ku kawaw, amana pisab…ôr~…ĺińß tu udip, u ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan adadan sakapańß ńßan mu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ. . pajdaŇč…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° manaibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °i., ubabar~…ĺańßan bakańßij , manapidat…ôŇč tu. . u tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kawaw , suajaw ńßan, u r~…ĺijas sananaj a tad…ômaw pabin tu pas…ôpi nu nababar~…ĺaki . tawar~…ĺ…ôn ku Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° atu sinpaj, bakańßij tu ku mikawaaj tu udip, dińß…ômaj ńßan ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sakapańß ńßan maudip tu d…ôd…ômiad. r~…ĺawp…ôs tu nu mińß ¶aan, sakapańß…ôn ku udip, u ¶ajaj kaw matatuduŇčaj a tad…ômaw saj ¶an tu pidat…ôŇč, u ¶aj kar~…ĺar~…ĺu ¶uk a kawaw saj ¶an tu pi kir~…ĺim najaj ku niw ¶i a kawaw manapa ¶i ¶i.***, . minanam muputun pab…ôr~…ĺi mir~…ĺijas, *****, kas…ônun sa mupuu Ē~ °t,atu maminnaj a kawaw, , tawar~…ĺ…ôn ku naajawaj ńßida ńßan tu.*******, kasibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° maudip ajda, sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßan taajaw. . mar~…ĺumanaj amińß ¶aan ,jadatu, bar~…ĺuńßaj amińß ¶aan iniwtu. . panatu kud…ômiad u r~…ĺawp…ôs tu numińß ¶aan , mir~…ĺijas tu tu ajawaj, , tinaku tu naajawaj, war~…ĺ…ôsaj ńßan ku udip, danaji…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. sańß…ômaw…ôn kunaajawaj, danaji…ôn ku udip, pasanaj…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. . bakańßji ku r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj , bakańßji ku r~…ĺar~…ĺum r~…ĺar~…ĺum daaw . . sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßan pa ¶akaj ku udip, kasitar~…ĺur~…ĺ satabar~…ĺi ńßan ku awas, , Ňčaj itanamin i bar~…ĺuńßaj a mińß ¶aan misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mar~…ĺa kas…ôn…ôŇča , manik…ôt adasaj…ôn kuni kaudip sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ńßan maudip!
S.FORM: siwsa ku demiad, mahida u nanum, slaw han u lawpes tu nu mihcaan . hican pasatedep ku malumanay a mihcaan , misuayawy tu baluhay a mihcaan ayda makakutay tu baluhay atu malumanay, haminen miasik ku udip, hatu nayien , bakahen ku laecusay kalaluman! maminnay a cacay mihcaan, payawan kapah laecus haw, , umaminay tu, payawan masukip masiku haw, saahebalen ku balucu'. . u kapahay ibalucu'en , alahican datengen, tawalen ku laecusay, manatu kasinpay. . anu tabtabaki kiya kawaw , anu cila a mihcaan u adidi'ay tu a kawaw, mana pidateng tu mamin nay akawaw awasen ayda, manatu pidateng,makawaa kaayaw. . maminnay amihcaan ,maemek ita ku ngelu' usadakadakay, idaw ku ngelu' aledah cilemin sicedam, u nitanaman kuyd u cacanan , nunikaufipan a naemekan . anu caay kalipahak , bilaw han ku piadih. anu caay kadamsay, satanengen ku anub, anu cay kakapah sa , misaicelang pacakay tu udip. . sakapahen ku kawaw, amana pisabelih tu udip, ucaculilan adadan sakapah han muculcul. . anu cay kakapah sa , misaicelang pacakay tu udip. . sakapahen ku kawaw, amana pisabelih tu udip, ucaculilan adadan sakapah han muculcul. . paydangen ku balucu' manaibalucu'i., ubabalahan bakahiy , manapidateng tu. . u tahekalay a kawaw , suayaw han, u liyas sananay a tademaw pabin tu pasepi nu nababalaki . tawalen ku ngelu' atu sinpay, bakahiy tu ku mikawaay tu udip, dihemay han ku balucu' sakapah han maudip tu dedemiad. lawpes tu nu mihcaan, sakapahen ku udip, u cayay kaw matatudungay a tademaw saycan tu pidateng, ucay kalalucuk a kawaw saycan tu pi kilim nayay ku niwci a kawaw manapacici.ŚĻīŚļēšļÜ, . minanam muputun pabeli miliyas, Ś≠łśúÉśĖ∑ść®ťõĘ, kasenun sa mupuu't,atu maminnay a kawaw, , tawalen ku naayaway hida han tu.śääŚĺěŚČćŚŅėŤ®ėťáčśá∑, kasibalucu' maudip ayda, saicelang han taayaw. . malumanay amihcaan ,yadatu, baluhay amihcaan iniwtu. . panatu kudemiad u lawpes tu numihcaan , miliyas tu tu ayaway, , tinaku tu naayaway, walesay han ku udip, danayien ku balucu'. sahemawen kunaayaway, danayien ku udip, pasanayen ku balucu'. . bakahyi ku laecusay , bakahyi ku lalum lalum daaw . . saicelang han pacakay ku udip, kasitalul satabali han ku awas, , ngay itanamin i baluhay a mihcaan misaicelang mala kasenenga , maniket adasayen Kuni kaudip salihalay han maudip!

¶ir~…ĺa a mińß ¶aan u adidi Ē~ °aj tu a kawaw, mana pidat…ôŇč tu mamin naj akawaw awas…ôn ajda, manatu pidat…ôŇč,makawaa kaajaw. . maminnaj amińß ¶aan ,ma…ôm…ôk ita ku Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° usadakadakaj, ku anub, anu ¶aj kakapańß sa , misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč pa ¶akaj tu udip. . sakapańß…ôn ku kawaw, amana pisab…ôr~…ĺińß tu udip, u ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan adadan sakapańß ńßan mu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ. . anu ¶aj kakapańß sa , misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč pa ¶akaj tu udip. . sakapańß…ôn ku kawaw, amana pisab…ôr~…ĺińß tu udip, u ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan adadan sakapańß ńßan mu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ. . pajdaŇč…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° manaibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °i., ubabar~…ĺańßan bakańßij , manapidat…ôŇč tu. . u tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kawaw , suajaw ńßan, u r~…ĺijas sananaj a tad…ômaw pabin tu pas…ôpi nu nababar~…ĺaki . tawar~…ĺ…ôn ku Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° atu sinpaj, bakańßij tu ku mikawaaj tu udip, dińß…ômaj ńßan ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sakapańß ńßan maudip tu d…ôd…ômiad. r~…ĺawp…ôs tu nu mińß ¶aan, sakapańß…ôn ku udip, u ¶ajaj kaw matatuduŇčaj a tad…ômaw saj ¶an tu pidat…ôŇč, u ¶aj kar~…ĺar~…ĺu ¶uk a kawaw saj ¶an tu pi kir~…ĺim najaj ku niw ¶i a kawaw manapa ¶i ¶i.***, . minanam muputun pab…ôr~…ĺi mir~…ĺijas, *****, kas…ônun sa mupuu Ē~ °t,atu maminnaj a kawaw, , tawar~…ĺ…ôn ku naajawaj ńßida ńßan tu.*******, kasibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° maudip ajda, sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßan taajaw. . mar~…ĺumanaj amińß ¶aan ,jadatu, bar~…ĺuńßaj amińß ¶aan iniwtu. . panatu kud…ômiad u r~…ĺawp…ôs tu numińß ¶aan , mir~…ĺijas tu tu ajawaj, , tinaku tu naajawaj, war~…ĺ…ôsaj ńßan ku udip, danaji…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. sańß…ômaw…ôn kunaajawaj, danaji…ôn ku udip, pasanaj…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. . bakańßji ku r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj , bakańßji ku r~…ĺar~…ĺum r~…ĺar~…ĺum daaw . . sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßan pa ¶akaj ku udip, kasitar~…ĺur~…ĺ satabar~…ĺi ńßan ku awas, , Ňčaj itanamin i bar~…ĺuńßaj a mińß ¶aan misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mar~…ĺa kas…ôn…ôŇča , manik…ôt adasaj…ôn kuni kaudip sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ńßan maudip!
